attributes.name: overflow
attributes.description: Set to true to prevent content from getting hidden if going outside the parent. Useful in combination with something like a Badge.

attributes.name: img-src
attributes.description: Use this to apply a image src

attributes.name: img-srcset
attributes.description: Use this to apply a image srcset

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Provide the name used for labels and to generate the initials.

attributes.name: initials
attributes.description: Use this to override the initials generated from the name.

properties.name: overflow
properties.description: Set to true to prevent content from getting hidden if going outside the parent. Useful in combination with something like a Badge.

properties.name: imgSrc
properties.description: Use this to apply a image src

properties.name: imgSrcset
properties.description: Use this to apply a image srcset

properties.name: name
properties.description: Provide the name used for labels and to generate the initials.

properties.name: initials
properties.description: Use this to override the initials generated from the name.

slots.description: For anything other than initials (no more than 2-3 characters)
